title: GDP | U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA)
summary: This is the BEA GDP landing page, which serves as a navigation hub listing various GDP-related data categories and tools rather than presenting actual GDP data or a news release. The page contains no specific GDP figures, no release date, and no policy-relevant content.
key_points: This is a navigation/landing page for GDP data, not an actual GDP data release or news statement
Page lists categories: GDP by Industry, GDP by State, GDP by County, GDP for U.S. Territories
No actual GDP figures, growth rates, or economic data are present in this source
No publication date is provided for this specific page
Page was last modified on 2/5/26 according to footer
why_it_matters: This page has no research value as it contains no actual economic data. It is a directory page that links to GDP data tools and categories. Actual GDP data would be found in separate news releases under 'News Releases' rather than this landing page.

issues_found: Source is a navigation/landing page (source_type: navigation_page), which per Rule 5 must be rejected
Contains no actual GDP figures, growth rates, or economic data
No publication date provided (published_at is empty string)
No research value as a standalone source - only provides links to data categories
event_type is correctly 'unknown' as this is not an actual GDP data release

notes: Per Rule 6: Navigation pages, listing pages, and similar non-content pages should be treated as non-archiveable. This page is the BEA GDP topic hub and provides no specific data or news content. It only lists navigation links to GDP by Industry, GDP by State, GDP by County, and related tools. For actual GDP macro catalyst research, seek the BEA's 'News Releases' section which contains specific GDP advance/second/third estimate releases with headline numbers and revisions.
